name: tierlist-maker
description: Helps a user author a TierVibe tier list end-to-end and produce a .tiervibe.json they import at https://tiervibe.com/t/import. Interviews the user, sets up tiers, drafts cards, writes markdown explanations. No server calls, no login until the final step.

interface.shortDescription: One prompt -> a publish-ready TierVibe tier list, with commentary on every card.
interface.longDescription: Interviews the user, sets up tiers (henz/love/custom presets + global brightness), drafts cards (text with coordinated colors or image placeholders), writes markdown commentary on each card, and emits a .tiervibe.json the user imports at tiervibe.com/t/import. No server calls, no login until the final step.
defaultPrompt: Make a tier list for AI coding models
Give AI coding models a tier list
